column3: Explore existing shared schema/type patterns for adding RuleTestIndex without bloating agents.meta.json.
column4: packages/shared schemas types zod exports agents-meta RuleTestIndex .fabric/rule-test.index.json
column18: {"id":"E1","status":"completed","findings":"RuleTestIndex should be a new shared sidecar schema, not an agents.meta.json extension. agents-meta schema is focused on hot-path rule selection, derives stable_id/layer/topology, and revision only hashes node id/hash/stable_id/identity_source. Pattern options: add packages/shared/src/schemas/rule-test-index.ts with zod schemas + z.infer types, export from shared index; keep stable_id as rule identity. V1 fields should model generated static mapping: schema_version, generated_at, entries keyed by stable_id/test_file/line, rule_hash, test_hash, previous_rule_hash, previous_test_hash. CLI sync-meta already owns .fabric writes; server doctor already has static check aggregation and can parse sidecar independently.","key_files":["packages/shared/src/schemas/agents-meta.ts","packages/shared/src/schemas/event-ledger.ts","packages/shared/src/index.ts","packages/shared/src/types/agents.ts","packages/shared/test/agents-meta.test.ts","packages/cli/src/commands/sync-meta.ts","packages/cli/__tests__/sync-meta.test.ts","packages/server/src/services/doctor.ts","packages/server/src/services/doctor.test.ts","packages/server/src/meta-reader.ts"],"error":""}

column3: Explore sync-meta implementation and tests to identify where to scan @fabric-verify annotations, compute test hashes, preserve previous hashes, and write/check the sidecar index.
column4: packages/cli sync-meta computeAgentsMeta check-only hash previous_rule_hash previous_test_hash @fabric-verify tests
column18: {"id":"E2","status":"completed","findings":"sync-meta currently only computes/writes agents.meta.json and check-only compares stableStringify(existingMeta) vs computedMeta; V1 sidecar generation should be a separate computeRuleTestIndex(target, computedMeta, previousIndex?) and check-only must compare both meta and sidecar. Reuse sha256(content), file walking ignore patterns, and stable ids from computedMeta. Preserve previous_rule_hash/previous_test_hash by keying prior entries on stable_id+test_file+line or annotation id. Doctor already has read-only report vs --fix mutation split; add rule-test index schema/read in shared/server, warning checks for missing index, unknown stable_id, stale rule hash, stale/missing test file. Tests belong in packages/cli sync-meta fixtures and packages/server doctor states. No existing @fabric-verify support.","key_files":["packages/cli/src/commands/sync-meta.ts","packages/cli/__tests__/sync-meta.test.ts","packages/shared/src/schemas/agents-meta.ts","packages/shared/src/types/agents.ts","packages/server/src/services/doctor.ts","packages/server/src/services/doctor.test.ts","packages/cli/src/commands/doctor.ts","docs/CONVENTIONS.md"],"error":""}

column3: Explore doctor report/service/CLI patterns to add a static Rule-test contracts check for covered, stale_rule, stale_test, orphan, and missing states.
column4: packages/server doctor DoctorCheck runDoctorReport meta drift status warn error rule-test contracts
column18: {"id":"E3","status":"completed","findings":"Doctor integration point is packages/server/src/services/doctor.ts: runDoctorReport Promise.all snapshots -> create*Check -> reduceStatus. Add inspectRuleTestContracts(projectRoot) reading .fabric/rule-test.index.json + readAgentsMeta, then createRuleTestContractsCheck. Missing/invalid index should warn unless strict is added; orphan annotations (unknown stable_id or missing test file) should error/warn per V1 policy; stale_rule/stale_test detected by comparing current meta node hash and current test file sha256 against rule_hash_at_sync/test_hash_at_sync while preserving previous_* fields for traceability. CLI needs no special rendering: packages/cli/src/commands/doctor.ts prints generic checks. Dashboard consumes generic checks, but client types may need optional summary fields. Tests fit in doctor.test.ts fixture style.","key_files":["packages/server/src/services/doctor.ts","packages/server/src/services/doctor.test.ts","packages/cli/src/commands/doctor.ts","packages/dashboard/src/api/client.ts","packages/dashboard/src/views/doctor.tsx","packages/cli/src/commands/sync-meta.ts","packages/shared/src/schemas/agents-meta.ts"],"error":""}
